description: Meta-ad copy that contains the shortened safe-harbour reference 'general CSF risk warning' — must pass ADV-001 under the universal-channel gate (2026-04-27 founder directive). Mirrors the canonical Task 3/4 meta-ad rewrite pattern (PR #94).
text: Be part of FarmThru. Lock in early access to invest when our CSF round opens. Reserve your spot with a small refundable deposit. See the general CSF risk warning + offer document.
